name: Rune Shaper
description: You learn the Comprehend Languages spell and can cast it once per long rest without a spell slot, or using your own slots. Additionally, you know a number of runes equal to half your proficiency bonus (rounded down). After a long rest, you inscribe these runes onto objects to learn specific 1st-level spells until your next long rest. You can cast each of these spells once per long rest without a spell slot or material components, and also using your own spell slots. Your spellcasting ability for these is Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma.
